what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment that points to an image asset in the design-assets channel.
observations: File contains only YAML frontmatter and no other content
standouts: References a specific design asset icon via an image:// URI (Icon_Share_Gold)
Attachment is typed as images in the design-assets channel
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
Target uses an image:// scheme to address a design asset
notes: This is a minimal attachment ledger entry linking an attachment id to a gold share icon asset in the design-assets channel.
questions: What is the actual attached image file or blob?
Who added this attachment and for what purpose?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit stated purpose beyond the metadata; the file does what its fields suggest by recording an attachment reference.
intention_signals: It appears to create a discoverable, timestamped record that a specific image attachment belongs to the design-assets channel and points at the Icon_Share_Gold asset.
novelty: Uses an image:// URI scheme to target a design asset rather than a filesystem path.
contribution: Provides a precise, timestamped metadata record that links an attachment identifier to a specific design-assets icon, enabling lookup and traceability without relying on file paths.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file in the design-assets channel that references the image asset image://design-assets/icons/Icon_Share_Gold with id att-d9398f38 and an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog an image attachment so it can be retrieved and associated with the Icon_Share_Gold design asset.
